empty.title: All clear
empty.subtitle: No pending tasks. New tasks appear here when TaskMind captures an actionable notification.

confirmations.title: Confirmations
confirmations.subtitle: Review notifications TaskMind isn't sure about

empty.title: Nothing to confirm
empty.subtitle: Low-confidence captures appear here for your review.

empty.title: No history yet
empty.subtitle: Completed and dismissed tasks appear here.

welcome.description: TaskMind watches your WhatsApp, email, and other apps — and automatically creates actionable tasks from messages that need your attention.
welcome.note: No snooze. No defer. Just do it.
welcome.privacyNote: All processing happens on your device. Nothing leaves your phone.

permissions.title: Grant Notification Access
permissions.description: TaskMind needs Notification Access to read your notifications and identify actionable tasks. This permission is required for the app to work.

apps.title: Choose Apps to Monitor
apps.description: TaskMind will only process notifications from these apps. You can change this anytime in Settings.

vip.title: VIP Contacts
vip.description: Messages from VIP contacts are automatically flagged as HIGH priority. Add people whose messages always matter.

priority.title: How Priorities Work
priority.description: TaskMind automatically assigns priorities based on keywords and urgency signals in your notifications.

urgent.label: URGENT
urgent.desc: Deadlines today, critical issues, words like "urgent", "ASAP", "deadline"

high.label: HIGH
high.desc: Action needed soon, VIP senders, keywords like "please review", "waiting for you"

medium.label: MEDIUM
medium.desc: Standard action items, replies needed, follow-ups

priority.learnNote: TaskMind learns from your confirmations and dismissals over time.

nudges.title: Configure Nudges
nudges.description: TaskMind can send a persistent notification reminding you of pending tasks. Configure when and how often.

done.title: You're all set!
done.description: TaskMind is now monitoring your selected apps. Actionable messages will automatically appear as tasks on your home screen.
done.reminder1: • No snooze. No "later". Just act on tasks.
done.reminder2: • Check Settings → Diagnostics if something isn't working.
done.reminder3: • For battery optimization: Settings → Device → Battery Guide.
